# Repository Metadata

This directory contains repository-wide governance and automation for the AWS-ECS-Blueprint project.

- `CONTRIBUTING.md`: contribution workflow, expectations, and review guidance.
- `SECURITY.md`: vulnerability reporting and security contact guidance.
- `CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md`: community behavior expectations.
- `dependabot.yml`: version update policy for GitHub Actions and Terraform dependencies.
- `workflows/dependency-review.yml`: supply-chain review for pull requests and pushes.
- `ISSUE_TEMPLATE/`: issue templates for public contributor-facing change requests.
- `PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE/`: pull request checklist and review context template.
- `actions/`: shared composite actions used by the workflow entrypoints.
- `workflows/`: focused CI, docs, PR planning, deployment, and live-validation pipelines.
